---
title: "Plots"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(RNAAgeCalc)
library(ComplexUpset)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)
```

## Samples distribution

```{r}
samples_healthy <- read_tsv("./data/file1_healthy_samples.tsv") 
samples_healthy <- column_to_rownames(samples_healthy, var="id")
```

```{r}
samples_healthy <- samples_healthy %>%
  mutate(Dataset_Intercept = as.numeric(factor(dataset)))

age_ranges <- samples_healthy %>%
  group_by(dataset, Dataset_Intercept) %>%
  summarise(min_age=min(age), max_age=max(age),.groups = "drop")

ggplot(samples_healthy, aes(x = age, y = Dataset_Intercept)) +
  geom_segment(data = age_ranges, aes(x = min_age, xend = max_age, y = Dataset_Intercept, yend = Dataset_Intercept),
              color = "grey", linewidth = 1.2) + 
  geom_point(aes(color = dataset), size = 2.5) +  # Points for each sample
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = unique(samples_healthy$Dataset_Intercept), labels = unique(samples_healthy$dataset)) + 
  labs(title = "Age Distribution by Dataset",
       x = "Age",
       y = "Dataset") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 14, color = "black"),
  )+
  theme(legend.position = "none")

```

```{r, eval=FALSE}
ggsave("./images/dataset_distribution.png", width = 12, height =6, bg="white" ,dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
ggplot(samples_healthy, aes(x = age, fill = gender)) +
    geom_bar(position = "stack", width = 0.8) +
    labs(x = "Age", y = "Number of samples", fill = "Gender",
         title = "Age Distribution with Gender Proportion") +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(10, 80, by = 10)) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 16) +  
    theme(
        plot.title = element_text( size = 18, hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
        legend.position = "top",
        axis.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold")
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("male" = "#1f77b4", "female" = "#ff7f0e")) 
```

```{r}
ggsave("./images/age_distribution.png", width =12, height = 6, bg="white" ,dpi = 300)
```


## Model performance

```{r}
predicted_age <- read_tsv("./data/plots_data/predicted_age_best_model.tsv")
predicted_val <- predicted_age$predicted_age
```


```{r}
  plot_data <- data.frame(y = samples_healthy$age,
                          predicted_values = predicted_val, 
                          dataset = samples_healthy$dataset )
    p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = predicted_values , y = y ,fill = dataset)) +
        geom_point( size = 2, shape = 21, stroke = 0.5) +
        labs(  title = "Chronologic age  vs Predicted age",
               x = "Predicted age (years) ",
               y = "Chronological age (years)"
        ) + theme_minimal()+
      geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black")
    p+
  ggtitle("Model prediction")+
  theme_minimal(base_size = 18)+
  theme(legend.text=element_text(size=12),
        legend.title = element_text(size=12))
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, include=FALSE,   eval=FALSE}
ggsave("./images/prediction.png", width = 8, height = 6, bg="white" ,dpi = 300)
```


```{r}
signatures <- get("genelist_all", envir = asNamespace("RNAAgeCalc"))
log_sqrt <- read_tsv("./data/plots_data/pmbcAge_intersection.tsv")
peters <- read_tsv("./data/plots_data/peters_1497_signature.csv")
geneAge <- read_csv("./data/plots_data/genage_human.csv")
gene_lists <- list( Peters = peters$symbol , #all_tissues
                   GenAge = geneAge$symbol,
                   GTExAge = names(signatures$all_tissues$GTExAge),
                   PBMCAge = log_sqrt$symbol  )

all_genes <- unique(unlist(gene_lists))

upset_data <- map_dfc(gene_lists, ~ all_genes %in% .x)
colnames(upset_data) <- names(gene_lists)
upset_data <- cbind(Gene = all_genes, upset_data)
```

```{r}
upset(
  upset_data,
  name = "",
  intersect = c( "Peters",  "GenAge","GTExAge","PBMCAge"),
  wrap=TRUE,
  set_sizes = ( upset_set_size( )+ 
                  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14, color = "black"),
                        axis.title = element_text(size = 14, color = "black"),
                        axis.ticks.x = element_line(color="black"))
                ),
  base_annotations = list(
    'Intersection size' = intersection_size(
      mapping=aes(fill="magenta"),
      show.legend=FALSE,
      counts = TRUE
    ) + theme(
      axis.text.x =element_blank(),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 14, color = "black"),
      axis.ticks.y = element_line(color="black")
    )
  ),
   themes=upset_modify_themes(
        list(
            'intersections_matrix'=theme(axis.text=element_text(size=14, color="black"))
            #'overall_sizes'=theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90))
        )
    ),
  queries = list(
    upset_query(set = "Peters", fill = "#0072B2"),
    upset_query(set = "GenAge", fill = "#D55E00"),
    upset_query(set = "GTExAge", fill = "#009E73"),
    upset_query(set = "PBMCAge", fill = "#CC79A7")
  ),
  min_size = 1
) + 
  theme_minimal(base_size = 18) +
  theme(
    #plot.title = element_text()
    #axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, color = "blue"),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),  # Remove x-axis title
    axis.text.x  = element_blank()#,  # Remove x-axis labels
   # axis.ticks.x = element_blank()   # Remove x-axis ticks
  )  +
ggtitle('Signatures intersection')+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, include=FALSE,   eval=FALSE}
ggsave("./images/signatures_intersection.png", width = 8, height = 6, bg="white" ,dpi = 300)
```


```{r}
long_stats_to_plot <- read_tsv("./data/plots_data/performance_with_random_genes.tsv")
significant_genes_stats <- read_tsv("./data/plots_data/performance_with_significant_genes.tsv")

long_stats_to_plot$num_genes_f <- as.factor(long_stats_to_plot$num_genes)
test_data <- long_stats_to_plot %>% filter(type == "test")

gene_sizes <- seq(50, 2000, by = 50) 
nruns <- 10 
nsamples <- 174

ggplot() +
  # --- Boxplot layer (test data only) ---
  geom_boxplot(
    data = test_data,
    aes(x = num_genes, y = r2, group = as.factor(num_genes_f),fill = "Random selection" ), 
    alpha = 0.4, color = "grey40",
    width = 30, outlier.shape = 21, outlier.size = 1.5
  ) +
  # --- Line + points (best model data) ---
  geom_line(
    data = significant_genes_stats,
    aes(x = num_genes, y = r2, color = "Rational selection"),
    linewidth = 1.2, alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = significant_genes_stats,
    aes(x = num_genes, y = r2, color = "Rational selection"),
    size = 3, alpha = 0.9
  ) +
 geom_vline(xintercept = 150, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.8) +
  # --- Axis scales ---
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(seq(0, max(significant_genes_stats$num_genes), 500),150),
    labels = function(x) ifelse(x == 150, "150", x),
    minor_breaks = seq(0, max(significant_genes_stats$num_genes), 50)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0.70, 0.9),
    breaks = seq(0.70, 0.9, 0.04),
    labels = label_number(accuracy = 0.01)
  ) +
  # --- Custom color/fill legends (Okabe–Ito palette) ---
  scale_color_manual(
    name = NULL,
    values = c("Rational selection" = "#E69F00")
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    name = NULL,
    values = c("Random selection" = "#56B4E9")
  ) +
  # --- Labels & theme ---
  labs(
    title = expression(paste("R"^2, " vs Number of Predictors")),
    x = "Number of genes",
    y = expression(R^2)
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14, base_family = "sans") +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 18, hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, color = "grey30", hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(size=16,color = "black"),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "grey90", linewidth = 0.3),
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.4),
        legend.position = "top",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold")
  )
```

```{r, echo=FALSE, include=FALSE,   eval=FALSE}
ggsave("./images/performance_comparison.png", width = 8, height = 6, bg="white" ,dpi = 300)
```
